manager.brief: Manager. Orchestrates work, monitors progress, assigns tasks, handles escalations.

worker.brief: Worker. Implements issues — writes code, tests, commits, closes with evidence.

reviewer.brief: Reviewer. Reviews code, validates quality, checks conventions and tests.

researcher.brief: Researcher. Investigates unknowns, plans architecture, writes spikes and specs.

prototyper.brief: Prototyper. Rapidly validates patterns — builds minimal tests in /tmp, reports evidence.
